channel.title: re9guide.it.com — Resident Evil Requiem (RE9) Complete Guide
channel.description: Comprehensive fan-made RE9 / Resident Evil Requiem guide. 13 tier lists, 17 weapon guides, 20 lore deep dives, walkthroughs, and more. Updated v1.02.
